center.name: 納波河
center.summary: 納波河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Rufous-backed stipplethroat、Lunulated antbird、Bay hornero等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bay hornero is found in the western Amazon Basin along the rios Huallaga, Ucayali, and Napo in Peru, and through extreme southern Colombia and western Brazil along the upper Amazon (rio Solimões). A sight record in Ecuador leads the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call it hypothetical in that country. The bay hornero primarily inhabits middle-aged river islands that undergo annual flooding, typically in stands of Cecropia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lunulated antbird is found in eastern Ecuador from Sucumbíos Province to Morona-Santiago Province and in northern and central Peru west of the Rio Napo and Rio Ucayali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: haematonota of the rufous-backed stipplethroat is found in eastern Peru south of the Napo and Amazon rivers between the departments of Loreto and Madre de Dios and in the adjacent Brazilian states of Amazonas and Acre

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: (It is known in French Guiana from a single specimen.) The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society calls the species hypothetical in Colombia. Major rivers in addition to the upper Amazon itself are the Napo, Pastaza, Ucayali, Madre de Díos, Jurua, and Tocantins. The white-bellied spinetail inhabits early successional growth on river islands, where it favors grassy areas with scattered bushes and small trees
